title: Senior Software Engineer - Unisys India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Unisys India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Unisys India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Unisys India:
Unisys India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India!
